title: Oreocharis longifolia
taxonomy: Oreocharis longifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family includes over 1,500 species of plants commonly known as the African violet or streptocarpus family. The genus Oreocharis is a group of plants native to Asia, with Oreocharis longifolia being one of its members. The Gesneriaceae family is also home to other popular ornamental plants, such as Episcia and Gloxinia.
